nasb.text: They shall fall in the midst of those who are slain by the sword. She is given over to the sword; they have drawn her and all her hordes away.

esv.text: They shall fall amid those who are slain by the sword. Egypt is delivered to the sword; drag her away, and all her multitudes.

cnv.text: 他們必倒在那些被刀所殺的人中間；刀既拔出，埃及和它的眾民都要被拉下去。

ccb.text: “埃及人要倒毙在丧身刀下的人当中。刀已出鞘，她和她的国民要被拖走。
